verdict: This facial cleanser prioritizes gentleness with minimal surfactants and glycerin for post-cleanse hydration. While excellent for sensitive skin, it lacks advanced cleansing actives.

_research.name: Cetaphil Daily Facial Cleanser
pros: Ultra-gentle, non-foaming formula safe for barrier-compromised skin
_research.con: May feel less effective for oily or acne-prone skin types.
